title: Matera featured in American Banker
excerpt: American Banker featured an article on the decline of credit cards in Brazil due to Pix written by Matera Co-Founder and CEO, Carlos Netto.
body: American Banker featured an article on the decline of credit cards in Brazil due to Pix written by Matera Co-Founder and CEO, Carlos Netto. Read the article [here](https://www.americanbanker.com/opinion/are-traditional-credit-cards-doomed-in-a-world-of-real-time-payments).
